title: Create Döner
description:
Lets add a Döner to Create.
Because it's delicious.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba9404ea56cf3cbbcb30a7f8eff1e05c9801e003.jpeg)
This small mod adds a Döner to Minecraft, using the Create Mod.

Use some Mutton on a Döner Spear and let it cook. Add some Bread and Vegetables et voila a Döner.

For Issues or Suggestions please open a Issue on [Github](https://github.com/PixelboysTM/createdoener/issues)
